final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: brand style guide / color & typography specification sheet
Primary request: create a brand color palette (primary + secondary colors) and typography specification display for the fragrance brand 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white rice paper texture background, subtle ink-wash grain
Subject: brand identity system — color swatches with hex codes and names, paired with Chinese/Latin typeface specimens; brand name 染秋 (RAN QIU) displayed prominently
Style/medium: editorial flat-lay design, East Asian aesthetic, refined minimalist layout
Composition/framing: portrait layout, structured grid — top section: brand name lockup; middle section: color swatch row with labels; bottom section: typeface specimen lines
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, calm and poetic, warm autumnal mood
Color palette:
  Primary — deep persimmon orange (#C0622A), osmanthus gold (#D4A843), amber brown (#7B4A2D)
  Secondary — misty celadon (#A8B8A0), ink grey (#4A4A4A), pale rice white (#F5EFE4), maple crimson (#8B2E1A)
Materials/textures: matte rice paper surface, subtle ink-bleed edges on type, no gloss
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: all color swatches must display hex value and Chinese name label; typography must feel rooted in East Asian brush/serif tradition while remaining legible; no photographic imagery, purely graphic/typographic
Avoid: neon or synthetic colors, Western-only sans-serif coldness, cluttered layout, drop shadows
